## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. 

## 🚀 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
What should have happened? (e.g., "The message should have sent to Supabase.")

## 💀 Actual Behavior
What actually happened? (e.g., "The app crashed and my phone got hot.")

## 📱 Environment Details
* **Platform:** [e.g. Android, Linux, Web]
* **Device/OS Version:** [e.g. Zorin OS 17, Samsung S24 Android 14]
* **App Version:** [e.g. v0.1.0-beta]

## 📸 Proof (Screenshots/Logs)
Add any screenshots or screen recordings here to help us debug.
